texto: Awful first drafts are fine—Agree with this.If you don’t finish something, you’ll never get in the game. Just quell the voice in your head that says “Are you kidding? No one is going to want to read this drivel” and keep on going. You’re going to revise and revise and then revise again anyway.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Jamie Freveletti que provoca limites e escolhas conscientes. Ao questionar “Awful first drafts are fine—Agree with this.If you don’t finish something, you’ll never get in th…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, first-drafts, writing, com foco em writing.
